Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.DateOfNonPrimaryCancerDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed' as DateOfNonPrimaryCancerDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed, -- Metastatic Site from non-primary cancer pathway. Will be mapped to a measurement value concept in a later ETL step. Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreNonPrimaryCancerPathwayRoute.MetastaticSite.@code' as MetastaticSite from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HA' and MetastaticSite is not null and MetastaticSite != '97';

Explanation.Description: Is the date where the Non Primary Cancer PATIENT DIAGNOSIS was confirmed or agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF NON PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: The site of the metastatic disease at PATIENT DIAGNOSIS during a Cancer Care Spell (non-primary pathway).
